title: 17-6 Definition of Listed Financial Institution - Canada.ca
content:
## 17-6 Definition of Listed Financial Institution
This memorandum explains the meaning of the term ' listed financial institution ' and provides details on who is a listed financial institution and/or a selected listed financial institution under the Excise Tax Act.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format 17-6-e.html

### Read the publication
- Online format 17-6-e.html
